title: Bastion Agent Claude Code settings
description: Minimal local schema for baked ~/.claude/settings.json. Root permits additional keys (Claude Code grows settings over time) but known subfields are strict to catch typos at CI. schemaVersion pins the shape; bump when an incompatible schema revision lands.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned to 1. Bump this + the schema $id fragment together on incompatible revisions.
